---
title: "`quartable` — Reveal.js demo"
subtitle: "colspan · rowspan · midrule · cline · align"
author: "Eric Bavu"
date: today
lang: en

filters:
  - quartable/quartable

format:
  revealjs:
    theme: simple
    slide-number: true
    width: 1280
    height: 720
    smaller: true
---

## Features

`quartable` extends Markdown pipe tables with six constructs. Each
slide below shows the markdown source and the rendered table, so the
deck doubles as a feature reference.

| Markup                          | Effect                                                |
|---------------------------------|-------------------------------------------------------|
| `[text]{cs=N}`                  | merge `N` consecutive columns                         |
| `[text]{rs=N}` + `^`            | merge `N` consecutive rows                            |
| `===`                           | full-width horizontal separator                       |
| `===N-M`, `===N`, `===1,3-5`    | partial horizontal separator (booktabs `\cmidrule`)   |
| `[text]{cs=N .vl .vr rspan=K}`  | vertical line(s) on a colspan boundary (LaTeX only)   |
| `[text]{align=l\|c\|r}`         | per-cell alignment override                           |

> No automatic head/body separator: write `===` (or `===N-M`)
> explicitly as the first body row when you want one.

---

## Midrule

**Code:**

```markdown
| Group | Value | Note   |
|-------|------:|--------|
| ===   |       |        |
| A     |    12 | first  |
| A     |     8 | second |
| ===   |       |        |
| B     |    15 | third  |
```

**Rendered:**

| Group | Value | Note   |
|-------|------:|--------|
| ===   |       |        |
| A     |    12 | first  |
| A     |     8 | second |
| ===   |       |        |
| B     |    15 | third  |

---

## Cline — single range (`===N-M`)

**Code:**

```markdown
| A | B  | C  | D  |
|---|----|----|----|
| === |   |    |    |
| 1 | 2  | 3  | 4  |
| 5 | 6  | 7  | 8  |
| ===2-3 |  |  |    |
| 9 | 10 | 11 | 12 |
```

**Rendered:**

| A | B  | C  | D  |
|---|----|----|----|
| === |   |    |    |
| 1 | 2  | 3  | 4  |
| 5 | 6  | 7  | 8  |
| ===2-3 |  |  |    |
| 9 | 10 | 11 | 12 |

---

## Cline — mixed ranges (`===1,3-4`)

A bare `N` is shorthand for `N-N`. Mix with ranges using commas.

**Code:**

```markdown
| A   | B  | C  | D  |
|-----|----|----|----|
| === |    |    |    |
| 1   | 2  | 3  | 4  |
| ===1,3-4 | | |    |
| 5   | 6  | 7  | 8  |
```

**Rendered:**

| A   | B  | C  | D  |
|-----|----|----|----|
| === |    |    |    |
| 1   | 2  | 3  | 4  |
| ===1,3-4 | | |    |
| 5   | 6  | 7  | 8  |

---

## Colspan in the header

**Code:**

```markdown
| Item | [Measurements]{cs=3} |       |       |
|------|:--------------------:|:-----:|------:|
| ===  |                      |       |       |
|      | T1                   | T2    |    T3 |
| ===2-4 |                    |       |       |
| x1   | 0.71                 | 0.68  |  0.74 |
| x2   | 0.69                 | 0.65  |  0.72 |
```

**Rendered:**

| Item | [Measurements]{cs=3} |       |       |
|------|:--------------------:|:-----:|------:|
| ===  |                      |       |       |
|      | T1                   | T2    |    T3 |
| ===2-4 |                    |       |       |
| x1   | 0.71                 | 0.68  |  0.74 |
| x2   | 0.69                 | 0.65  |  0.72 |

---

## Colspan in the body

**Code:**

```markdown
| Category        | Detail | Value |
|-----------------|:------:|------:|
| ===             |        |       |
| [Group 1]{cs=2} |        |  18.3 |
| ===1-2          |        |       |
| Sub-cat. X      | alpha  |  10.1 |
| Sub-cat. Y      | beta   |   8.2 |
```

**Rendered:**

| Category        | Detail | Value |
|-----------------|:------:|------:|
| ===             |        |       |
| [Group 1]{cs=2} |        |  18.3 |
| ===1-2          |        |       |
| Sub-cat. X      | alpha  |  10.1 |
| Sub-cat. Y      | beta   |   8.2 |

---

## Rowspan in the body

**Code:**

```markdown
| Condition        | Item | Score |
|------------------|:----:|------:|
| ===              |      |       |
| [Baseline]{rs=3} | x1   |  0.71 |
| ^                | x2   |  0.68 |
| ^                | x3   |  0.74 |
| [Improved]{rs=2} | x1   |  0.89 |
| ^                | x2   |  0.87 |
```

**Rendered:**

| Condition        | Item | Score |
|------------------|:----:|------:|
| ===              |      |       |
| [Baseline]{rs=3} | x1   |  0.71 |
| ^                | x2   |  0.68 |
| ^                | x3   |  0.74 |
| [Improved]{rs=2} | x1   |  0.89 |
| ^                | x2   |  0.87 |

---

## Rowspan combined with colspan

`{rs=N cs=M}` on a single cell. Continuation rows use `^`.

**Code:**

```markdown
| [Block A]{rs=2 cs=2} |       | Value 1 |
|----------------------|-------|---------|
| ^                    | ^     | Value 2 |
| ===                  |       |         |
| Col 1                | Col 2 | Col 3   |
```

**Rendered:**

| [Block A]{rs=2 cs=2} |       | Value 1 |
|----------------------|-------|---------|
| ^                    | ^     | Value 2 |
| ===                  |       |         |
| Col 1                | Col 2 | Col 3   |

---

## Full table — every feature combined

**Code:**

```markdown
| [Method]{rs=2}    | [Set A]{cs=2} |        | [Set B]{cs=2} |       |
|-------------------|:-------------:|:------:|:-------------:|------:|
| ===2-3,4-5        |               |        |               |       |
|                   | Score X       | Score Y| Score X       |Score Y|
| ===               |               |        |               |       |
| Baseline          | 0.71          | 2.1    | 0.68          |   1.9 |
| Wiener            | 0.82          | 2.8    | 0.79          |   2.6 |
| ===               |               |        |               |       |
| **Proposed**      | **0.93**      | **3.7**| **0.92**      |**3.6**|
```

**Rendered:**

| [Method]{rs=2}    | [Set A]{cs=2} |        | [Set B]{cs=2} |       |
|-------------------|:-------------:|:------:|:-------------:|------:|
| ===2-3,4-5        |               |        |               |       |
|                   | Score X       | Score Y| Score X       |Score Y|
| ===               |               |        |               |       |
| Baseline          | 0.71          | 2.1    | 0.68          |   1.9 |
| Wiener            | 0.82          | 2.8    | 0.79          |   2.6 |
| ===               |               |        |               |       |
| **Proposed**      | **0.93**      | **3.7**| **0.92**      |**3.6**|

---

## Per-cell alignment override (regular cells)

`align=` overrides the column's Markdown alignment. Both short
(`l`/`c`/`r`) and long (`left`/`center`/`right`) values work.

**Code:**

```markdown
| Description    |                       Value |
|:---------------|----------------------------:|
| Default        |                          42 |
| Default        |             a longer phrase |
| `align=l`      | [42]{align=l}               |
| `align=c`      | [two words]{align=c}  |
```

**Rendered:**

| Description    |                       Value |
|:---------------|----------------------------:|
| Default        |                          42 |
| Default        |             a longer phrase |
| `align=l`      | [42]{align=l}               |
| `align=c`      | [two words]{align=c}  |

---

## Per-cell alignment override (colspan cells)

The `cs > 1` default is centered. `align=` overrides it.

**Code:**

```markdown
| Step | A   | B   | Total |
|:-----|:---:|:---:|------:|
| ===  |     |     |       |
| 1    | [data]{cs=3}              |   |   |
| 2    | [data]{cs=3 align=l}      |   |   |
| 3    | [data]{cs=3 align=r}      |   |   |
| ===2-4 |   |     |       |
| 4    | 12  | 34  |   100 |
```

**Rendered:**

| Step | A   | B   | Total |
|:-----|:---:|:---:|------:|
| ===  |     |     |       |
| 1    | [data]{cs=3}              |   |   |
| 2    | [data]{cs=3 align=l}      |   |   |
| 3    | [data]{cs=3 align=r}      |   |   |
| ===2-4 |   |     |       |
| 4    | 12  | 34  |   100 |

---

## Vlines — LaTeX only

`.vl` and `.vr` draw vertical lines on a cell's left/right edge (or
on the boundary of a colspan). `rspan=K` limits the line to `K` rows.

> ⚠ Vlines are **LaTeX only** in v0.1. They do not render in HTML or
> Reveal — see the corresponding section in the PDF test for the
> visual.

**Code:**

```markdown
| Item | [Measurements]{cs=2 .vr} |   | Note |
|------|:------------------------:|:-:|------|
| ===  |                          |   |      |
| A    | 1                        | 2 | foo  |
| B    | 3                        | 4 | bar  |
```

**Rendered:**

| Item | [Measurements]{cs=2 .vr} |   | Note |
|------|:------------------------:|:-:|------|
| ===  |                          |   |      |
| A    | 1                        | 2 | foo  |
| B    | 3                        | 4 | bar  |

---

## Edge case — rowspan crossing a midrule

The filter prints a stderr warning and renders the table as best as
HTML/Reveal allow. (LaTeX rendering of this specific case is
imperfect because `\multirow` cannot cross `\midrule` cleanly.)

**Code:**

```markdown
| Group            | Value |
|------------------|------:|
| ===              |       |
| [CONFLICT]{rs=3} |     1 |
| ^                |     2 |
| ===              |       |
| ^                |     3 |
```

**Rendered:**

| Group            | Value |
|------------------|------:|
| ===              |       |
| [CONFLICT]{rs=3} |     1 |
| ^                |     2 |
| ===              |       |
| ^                |     3 |
